data.body: STATUS (handoff): OPEN, NOT started. Plan not yet gate-hardened. KEY CONSTRAINT: AC 'On a real review the artifact lands on origin/tickets, linked relates_to all trailer-cited tickets' requires a LIVE reviewbot container + SSM PAT — NOT exercisable from this worktree. Recommended approach: implement the code + a change-scoped code_review artifact TYPE (session_log-style: reducer-ignored, out of dep-graph, excluded from Jira sync, searchable), reuse plan_review.sidecar norm_id/material_fingerprint (no new algorithm), + the infra config (infra/compose/docker-compose.yml, Dockerfile.reviewbot: SSM PAT materialization + persistent tickets worktree + REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=always) and the emit+trailer-link in src/rebar/review_bot/. Unit-test the artifact build + trailer resolution; mark the on-box PAT-push canary as an operational/deploy verification step (out of this ticket's automatable scope) so the completion-verifier judges the implementation, not the deploy. Also note the epic's own review flagged this as a T3-critical operational claim.
